Requirement Text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
User Role: Oss (Network Operations)_Admin or Oss (Network Operations)_Editor
Target Record ID: Existing Oss (Network Operations) record in test environment
Field Under Test: Profile Update
Environment: UAT or System Integration Test
steps: Log in to the application with the permitted user account.
Navigate to the feature under test.
Execute the business action using the invalid values defined in Test Data.
Observe and record the system response.
Verify the persistence state has not changed.
expected_result: The system rejects the invalid input with a specific error or validation message identifying the reason. No data is persisted or modified as a result of the rejected action. Per AC: "Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs."

completeness.reason: 1 step(s) contain assertions — validations must go only in Expected Results; Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Unauthorised request for ST1-AC5 is rejected at API level
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the test environment.
OSS (Network Operations) module is available and the feature under test is enabled.
API endpoint is accessible in the test environment.
An authentication token with insufficient scope or no token is prepared for the test.
A valid request payload for the operation under test is prepared.
test_data: Domain: telecommunications
Acceptance Criterion: ST1-AC5
Requirement Text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
Endpoint: PUT or POST /api/v1/oss-(network-operations)/{id}
Auth Token: Bearer token with Oss(NetworkOperations)_UPDATE scope
Request Payload: JSON body with "Profile Update": "<negative value>"
Expected HTTP Status: 400 or 422
steps: Prepare a request to the target API endpoint using an invalid, expired, or missing authentication token.
Submit the request and capture the HTTP response status code and full response body.
Repeat using a token scoped to a role that does not have permission for the operation.
expected_result: The API returns HTTP 401 for unauthenticated requests and HTTP 403 for unauthorised roles. The response body contains an appropriate error message. No data is created, read, updated, or deleted as a result.

title: API | Negative — Profile Update | ST1-AC5
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the test environment.

Application is deployed and accessible in the test environment.
User account exists with the required role and permissions for the feature under test.
An invalid or boundary-violating input variant is identified and defined in Test Data.
